title: User Management
description: Add, edit, and manage staff members who have login access to the system.

list.no_staff_message: No staff members have been added yet.

form.password_placeholder_edit: Leave blank to keep current password
form.password_info_new: A temporary password will be created. The user can change it after their first login.
form.password_info_edit: Leave this field empty if you do not wish to change the user's password.
form.property_info: This user will be assigned to your current property.

permissions.staff_management_admin_note: Only an Admin can grant or revoke 'Staff Management' or 'Settings' permissions.

add_modal.title: Add New Staff User
add_modal.description: Create a new user account with login credentials and assign permissions.

edit_modal.title: Edit Staff User
edit_modal.description: Update the details and permissions for this staff member.

delete_dialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the staff member's account and remove their access to the system. Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?

create_success.description: {{name}} has been invited and added to the staff list.

toasts.create_error: An unknown error occurred while creating the user.
toasts.delete_error: Could not delete the user account.
toasts.error_email_in_use: This email is already in use by another account.
toasts.error_weak_password: The password is too weak. Please use a stronger password.
toasts.error_generic_signup: An unexpected error occurred during signup.

cannot_edit_own_role: You cannot change your own role.
